name: Grand Canyon Education, Inc.
summary: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. (GCE) is a publicly traded education services company providing technology, marketing, and operational support to colleges and universities. Its primary partner is Grand Canyon University (GCU), a non-profit Arizona university. GCE serves 20 university partners across the U.S., supporting over 136,200 students. Services include a proprietary LMS (Halo), AI tools (Mosaic platform), admissions, financial aid processing, curriculum development, and off-campus healthcare classroom and laboratory sites.

products.name: Halo
products.description: Proprietary cloud-native Learning Management System offering course delivery, grading, analytics, and student interaction tools.

products.name: Mosaic
products.description: Proprietary AI platform providing centralized, secure, permission-based AI tools for students, faculty, and staff.

products.name: LoudCloud
products.description: GCE's previous proprietary learning management system, used by GCU prior to Halo.

products.name: Customer Relations Management System
products.description: Commercial CRM platform to manage, track, and report on prospective and active student interactions.

products.name: Off-campus Classroom and Laboratory Sites
products.description: Physical healthcare simulation and skills lab facilities built and operated by GCE for university partners.

partnerships.description: Primary university partner; GCE provides comprehensive technology, marketing, and operational services under a master services agreement.
